title: OverWidthError: Testbench C set input 'm_axi_awid' to value that overflows what the signal's width can fit
body:
Hi,
I am new to Verilator and have a very basic question: how do I assign values of specific bit-width to the input port in my testbench?
For example, my top level module has an input port of width 4 bits. I use a uint8_t type variable in my testbench to assign value to this input port and get this error: 
`uint8_t awid = 1;
 Top->m_axi_awid = awid;`

%Error: unknown:0: Testbench C set input 'm_axi_awid' to value that overflows what the signal's width can fit

How do I specify the variable in my testbench to avoid such Error?

thanks

Zefu
